# version

**Instance Property**

The version of this structure. It should be set to 0.

## Declaration

```swift
var version: UInt32
```

## Instance Properties

- **getBytes**: A pointer to a function that copies data from the provider. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGDataProviderGetBytesCallback].
- **releaseInfo**: A pointer to a function that handles clean-up for the data provider, or `NULL`. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGDataProviderReleaseInfoCallback].
- **rewind**: A pointer to a function Core Graphics calls to return the provider to the beginning of the data stream. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.coregraphics/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGDataProviderRewindCallback].
- **skipForward**: A pointer to a function that Core Graphics calls to advance the stream of data supplied by the provider.
